name: per_player_catchable_deep_target
expected_query: with "t50f79746220a1e3f1e1435018586c29a" as (select "nfl_plays"."trg_pid" as "pid", SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."dot" between 20 and 99 and "nfl_plays"."catchable_ball" = true group by "nfl_plays"."trg_pid"), "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11" as (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trg_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by COALESCE(trg_pid)) select "player"."pid", CAST(t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11.trg_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(t50f79746220a1e3f1e1435018586c29a.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "trg_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t50f79746220a1e3f1e1435018586c29a" on "t50f79746220a1e3f1e1435018586c29a"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11" on "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11"."trg_from_plays", t50f79746220a1e3f1e1435018586c29a.rate_type_total_count, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
